# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-0c55b159cbfafe1f0 # Replace with your desired AMI ID
      InstanceType: t2.micro         # Replace with your desired instance type
      KeyName: MyKeyPair            # Replace with your key pair name
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref MySecurityGroup
  MyEBSVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt MyEC2Instance.AvailabilityZone
      Size: 20                      # Volume size in GB
      Encrypted: false             # Encryption will be added in phase 2
  EBSAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdh
      InstanceId: !Ref MyEC2Instance
      VolumeId: !Ref MyEBSVolume
  MySecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable SSH access via port 22
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: '22'
          ToPort: '22'
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0         # Adjust the CIDR as needed for security
Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: "EC2 instance ID"
    Value: !Ref MyEC2Instance
  VolumeId:
    Description: "EBS volume ID"
    Value: !Ref MyEBSVolume
